test.name: Login To Freshservice

kw.name: Login To Freshservice
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Message: no such window: target window already closed from unknown error: web view not found (Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.49) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff722380365+146d5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7223803d0+14740] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7220ed7cd] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7220c3e92] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff722176e56] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7221940e2] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff722139018] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff722139f03] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff722695a39+329da9] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff72268ff86+3242f6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7226b31f2+347562] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff72239d4f5+31865] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7223a612c+3a49c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff722389754+1dac4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff722389906+1dc76] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff72236e417+2787] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffd192be8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffd1a90c48c+2c]

test.doc: Logs in to Freshservice with valid credentials.
